CustomField.formula: IF( !ISBLANK(Image_1_URL__c), HYPERLINK( "/s/needs-offers/" & CASESAFEID(Id) & "/", IMAGE( Image_1_URL__c + $Organization.Id , "Image",( VALUE(LEFT(Image_1_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_1_Ratio__c) - 1))*0.5), (VALUE(RIGHT(Image_1_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_1_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_1_Ratio__c)))*0.5) ), "_self" ), HYPERLINK( "/s/needs-offers/" & CASESAFEID(Id) & "/",IMAGE( "https://fimby.file.force.com/sfc/dist/version/renditionDownload?rendition=ORIGINAL_PNG&versionId=068OL000009Oljm&operationContext=DELIVERY&contentId=05TOL00000C0Jmv&page=0&d=/a/OL000005Sw7r/OKDNFyj75aMsfE_GlPJ8TPNveNWr_59xEBJ8YWwQk0s&oid=00D5f000006NDkr", "Default image", 100, 100 ), "_self" ) )
CustomField.label: View Post
